title: wedelia fruticosa
intro: Wedelia fruticosa, also known as the wild daisy or trema, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia fruticosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Wedelia fruticosa include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
